readings.Aries: Not everyone processes at your speed. Today, your patience is more powerful than your pace. Simpler is correct here.
readings.Taurus: Your relationship with money is your relationship with security. They are not the same thing. Something small done consistently has more effect than something large done once.
readings.Gemini: Something you said as a joke was your actual opinion. The joke was protective cover. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Cancer: Something is about to feel better. Not because anything changed — because the feeling has run its course. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Leo: There is a project that deserves your full flame. Stop parcelling it out in careful doses. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Virgo: The person who doesn't appreciate your efforts — their appreciation was never the point. Reconnect with the actual point. The timing is better than it feels.
readings.Libra: The person you've been gentle with needs something less gentle today. You can do that. The answer that feels too obvious is probably the actual answer.
readings.Scorpio: Something is ending that you don't want to end. Your resistance is understandable and will not stop it. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.
readings.Sagittarius: Something you know through experience — not theory — is what's needed right now. Sleep on it before committing.
readings.Capricorn: The thing you're working toward is real. The price you're paying for it deserves examination. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Aquarius: You've been talking about changing something for long enough that the talking has become a substitute for changing. What worked before will not work the same way this time.
readings.Pisces: The escape you're planning will not be there when you return. What would it mean to be here instead? This situation responds well to direct engagement.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: The intensity is real. Whether it's connection or pressure depends on which day you're asking.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You both live a little inside your heads. When you're together, the heads get very crowded.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You make each other more — more energised, more expansive, occasionally more than either of you can contain.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: The depth here is real and a little unnerving to both of you.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Reliability offered freely in both directions. What neither of you is good at is saying what you actually want.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: The air feeds the fire, the fire warms the air. You both tend to enjoy this too much to notice when it tips.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
